generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when the power grid in Texas was hit by a cyberattack last winter? That's why we can't afford to rely on foreign tech for our critical infrastructure. Our allies are stretched thin, and waiting for them to defend us isn't a strategy. We need to invest in our own strategic autonomy now - before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #CyberDefense
